raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The lighter box is on top of the darker box, with its lateral faces unobstructed and within reach of both arms. Sufficient vertical clearance exists for a straight lift.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors and is no longer supported by the darker box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (left side, clear area)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the lighter box and a clear area is available on the left side of the table, free from obstacles and large enough (≥30×30 cm).",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is placed stably on the left side of the table, leaving the darker box fully exposed and accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box (bottom)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is now unobstructed on all sides and within reach of both arms, with enough space beside it for lateral contact.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly grasped by the robot and lifted off the table, completing the task requirement of picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The lighter box is on top of the darker box, with its lateral faces unobstructed and within reach of both arms. Sufficient vertical clearance exists for a straight lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors and is no longer supported by the darker box.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the lighter box and a clear area is available on the left side of the table, free from obstacles and large enough (≥30×30 cm).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is placed stably on the left side of the table, leaving the darker box fully exposed and accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is now unobstructed on all sides and within reach of both arms, with enough space beside it for lateral contact.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly grasped by the robot and lifted off the table, completing the task requirement of picking it up.
